title: Gel Printing Plate for Monotype, Portable Supplies for Card Making, Creative Hobbies, Square
features: 【Easy to Clean】: Reusable gel plate is easy to clean after each use, making it a effective choice for artistic fun
【Packaging】: You will receive 1x Gel Print Plate
【Flexibility】Painting Tool can adapt to a variety of surfaces such as paper, cloth, wood or pp, making it ideal for printmaking, DIY projects or children's art activities.
【Simple to Use】: just cover with paper, press evenly, and reveal vibrants prints, great for art projects at home or school
【Material】: Gel Print Plate is made from silicone and gel material, durability and sturdy, long service time
